Spacious Accommodations: Sherlock's Home - Guest House in Namur offers spacious family rooms with private bathrooms. Each room features a balcony or terrace, garden views, and modern amenities including free WiFi, air-conditioning, and a work desk.
Leisure Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or in the heated indoor swimming pool. The property includes a picnic area, outdoor dining space, and a private balcony, providing ample opportunities for leisure and outdoor activities.
